data.title: RED test: assert dso-setup.sh completion output references root INSTALL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Given / When / Then
- Given: a temporary git repository, PLUGIN_ROOT set to DSO plugin directory
- When: `bash plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh $T $PLUGIN_ROOT` is run
- Then: output does NOT contain `docs/INSTALL.md` and DOES contain `INSTALL.md` as root reference

## Implementation Steps
1. In `tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh`, add function `test_setup_references_root_install_doc`:
   - Use a temp dir ($T via mktemp -d), add to TMPDIRS
   - Run `output=$(bash "$SETUP_SCRIPT" "$T" "$PLUGIN_ROOT" 2>&1) || true`
   - Assert: `! grep -q 'docs/INSTALL\.md' <<< "$output"` — the old path must not appear
   - Call the function at bottom of file with other tests
2. In `.test-index`, add entry: `plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh: tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh [test_setup_references_root_install_doc]`
   - The RED marker `[test_setup_references_root_install_doc]` allows the pre-commit gate to tolerate the failing test until Task 3 implements the fix

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test function `test_setup_references_root_install_doc` added to `tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh`
  Verify: grep -q 'test_setup_references_root_install_doc' tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh
- [ ] Test FAILS before dso-setup.sh is updated (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL.*test_setup_references_root_install_doc'
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED marker for `plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh`
  Verify: grep '\[test_setup_references_root_install_doc\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0 with RED marker in place (gate tolerates failing RED test)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
